title: Cinematograph (Certification) Rules, 1983, Delete sub-rule 6 of Rule 21

In the Cinematograph (Certification) Rules, 1983, in rule 21, sub-rule (6) shall be deleted. [No. M-11017/1/2017-DO(FC] ASHOK KUMAR R. PARMAR, Jt. Secy. Note:- The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), vide number G.S.R. 381 (E), dated the 9th May, 1983 and lastly amended vide number G.S.R. 77(E), dated the 31st January, 2017.
